column1: TTK Group was founded in 1928 founded by Mr. T.T. Krishnamachari who set up the distribution for a wide range of products ranging from Foods, Personal care products, etc. The company is India’s largest kitchenware company. TTK Prestige was Established in 1955 as a private limited company, TTK went public in 1994. It is among the leading brands in the kitchen equipment space, especially in the pressure cooker segment. [1] In 2012 Company had an Alliances with global high-end brands for high-end cookware/Store ware/Water Filters/ Gas-tops [2]
